title: YouTube star IShowSpeed lands dream anime project backed by One Piece live-action showrunner
summary_full: YouTuber IShowSpeed is venturing into the anime world with a new series produced by Matt Owens, the showrunner of the live-action One Piece. This significant career milestone sees Speed's high-energy persona translated into animation by Big Shot Pictures. The project, also produced by Harmony Korine and Brian Robbins, marks a dream come true for the popular content creator.
